name: resume-parser-ai-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Parse resumes to extract skills, match against jobs, and score candidates.

tools.name: parse_resume
tools.description: Parse resume text and extract structured information: contact, skills, education, experience.

tools.name: extract_skills
tools.description: Extract and categorize all skills from resume text with proficiency estimates.

tools.name: match_job
tools.description: Match a resume against job requirements and return a compatibility report.

tools.name: score_resume
tools.description: Score a resume on completeness, formatting indicators, and content quality (0-100).
